features.description: Base capability. Always on across every tier.
Users can hold TenantMember rows on more than one Tenant within the same Application. Off on small tier.
Users can upload a Profile.avatar_url. Available across all tiers; per-tier size caps come from `avatar_upload` entitlement.
Users can override the tenant's default_locale via Profile.locale. Off on small tier — medium+ users pick their own.
Admins can upload a CSV to invite many users at once. Consumes `bulk_user_provision` quota. Off on small tier.
Enables the athlete-with-login flow (Wave 7 sports module wires `Athlete.user_id`). Gated by compliance floor per §5 — tenants in COPPA regions cannot enable for minors under 13.
Sends a confirmation email when the User's Profile changes. Off by default; tenants flip on to detect account-takeover attempts.
Adds a 'delete my account' button in the /me settings page. Requires `compliance.gdpr.enabled` on the tenant's region.
